name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT
description: OTLP HTTP ingest for traces, metrics, and logs on the host-run Nest stack.

name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT
description: Optional OTLP traces override when not using the shared OTLP endpoint.

name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_ENDPOINT
description: Optional OTLP metrics override when not using the shared OTLP endpoint.

name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_LOGS_ENDPOINT
description: Optional OTLP logs override when not using the shared OTLP endpoint.

name: OTEL_SERVICE_NAME
description: OpenTelemetry service.name used by Jaeger, Prometheus, and structured logs.

name: OTEL_SDK_DISABLED
description: Set to true to skip OpenTelemetry bootstrap in local or test runs.

name: ESHOP_CATALOG_DATABASE_URL
description: PostgreSQL connection string for catalog-service.

name: ESHOP_IDENTITY_DATABASE_URL
description: PostgreSQL connection string for identity-service.

name: ESHOP_ORDERING_DATABASE_URL
description: PostgreSQL connection string for ordering-service and workers.

name: ESHOP_WEBHOOKS_DATABASE_URL
description: PostgreSQL connection string for webhooks-service.

name: ESHOP_REDIS_URL
description: Redis connection string for basket projections.

name: ESHOP_RABBITMQ_HOST
description: RabbitMQ host for integration events.

name: ESHOP_RABBITMQ_PORT
description: RabbitMQ AMQP port exposed on the host.

name: ESHOP_IDENTITY_ISSUER_URL
description: Identity issuer URL used by storefront and API clients.

name: ESHOP_JWT_SYMMETRIC_SECRET
description: Shared HS256 secret for local JWT issuance and validation.

name: ESHOP_CATALOG_HTTP_URL
description: Catalog HTTP base URL for local service-to-service calls.

name: ESHOP_ORDERING_HTTP_URL
description: Ordering HTTP base URL for local service-to-service calls.

name: ESHOP_MOBILE_BFF_URL
description: Mobile BFF base URL for local clients.

name: ESHOP_WEBHOOKS_API_URL
description: Webhooks API base URL for local clients.

name: COMPOSE_PROFILES
description: Docker Compose profiles used to start infra and observability locally.
